chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-1036 of 2022 Const. Petition No. D-1037 of 2022 Const. Petition No. D-1068 of 2022 Const. Petition No. D-1069 of 2022 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of main case. 11.08.2025. Mr. Tariq Hussain, Advocate for the Petitioners. Syed Samiullah Shah, Advocate for Pakistan Railways. Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar, AAG. ------------------------------ All the petitioners have been retired and received their pensions and gratuity and the only issue which remains is that they are expecting some settlement due out of the Prime Minister’s Assistance Package. Learned counsel for Pakistan Railways states that at this point of time there are no funds under the head of Prime Minister Assistance Package to make payment to the petitioners. Secretary Pakistan Railways is directed to make a request to the Principle Secretary to Prime Minister to provide the required funds which need to be paid to the petitioners, thereafter, it is expected that the petitioners’ dues from the head of Prime Minister’s Assistance Package shall be paid once such amount is received. A copy of this order shall be sent to Secretary Railways and Principle Secretary to the Prime Minister for information and compliance. Petitions stand disposed of in the above terms alongwith all pending applications, if any. Office to place copy of this order in all connected matters. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
